items.name_en: !!️《With Complete Original Green Box Packaging》!!️ GG Detail Wallet. Gucci leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with green GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas, green leather trim, brass hardware with green ceramic finish, GG detail cloud print fabric lining. Inside: card slot, coin pocket, 1 bill compartment. Model: 768244. Closed dimensions: 11 (W) x 9cm (H). Open dimensions: 21 (W) x 9cm (H). Color: Cognac/Brown PVC. Italian creation. Weight: approx. 0.045 kg

items.name_en: 🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M80334 Hardware Green】This horizontal Zippy Wallet is made from Monogram Eclipse canvas with bronze-toned hardware. Inspired by the traditional vertical Zippy wallet, it features a horizontal orientation for enhanced practicality. This all-zippered wallet design includes a main compartment with a zippered central wallet, six card slots on each side, and two flat pockets for bills. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10 cm C
